RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crtbl_table_idg64.plsql
RuleSet.Descr: Oracle Create Id64 Generator Table PL/SQL Script
RuleSet.GenFile:
-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ CREATE TABLE $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$_idg64 ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_IdgCreateColComma )$ slice_id SMALLINT$clause_NotNull$, next_id $clause_ColType$$clause_NotNull$ ) TABLESPACE $lower DbSchemaName$_data1$RunSqlStmt$
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX $lower DbTableName$_idg64_pidx ON $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg64($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_PKeyColComma )$ slice_id ) TABLESPACE $lower DbSchemaName$_idx1$RunSqlStmt$
ALTER TABLE $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$_idg64 ADD CONSTRAINT pk_$lower DbTableName$_idg64 PRIMARY KEY ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_PKeyColComma )$ slice_id )$RunSqlStmt$
